stemHtml: Which of the following can be shown on a Head-Up Display (HUD)?

options.b: PFD, ND in ROSE mode, and EFIS Engine parameter indications.
options.c: The PFD and Navigation Display (ND) in ROSE mode.
options.d: PFD, ND in ROSE mode, EFIS Engine parameter indications, and Hydraulics and Landing Gear status.
